



a [[Country_Club|Disorient COUNTRY CLUB]] event<BR>
[[Image:CCWebsiteSplash_2026_v006.png|550px]] [[Image:20260121.CCXiVVexillum.png|205px]] 
==OVERVIEW==
Join Disorient for year 14 of our annual journey of deep chilling, off-the-grid futurist relaxation. Country Club is a
lake and lush green woodland oasis where blissful self-reliance meets massive multiplayer techno and technology
participation. We invite you to roam the wild forest adventuring in constantly shifting blank canvas of music, art, and
performance. Country Club is an event organized by an all volunteer team.

<P>

Disorient presents: COUNTRY CLUB XIV - Presence and the Eternal Now<BR>
Thu, May 21, NOON to Mon, May 25, NOON 2026 <BR>
Secret Location Upstate<BR>
Location released to ticket holders week of the event<BR>

==2026 THEME==
Disorient Country Club 2026 Theme: Presence and the Eternal Now<BR>
An orderly return to chaos. A found frequency where previously there was static. Returning to consciousness by
following that sweet distant melody... we realize only the current moment ever existed. Fully awake, now contemplating
the texture of silence, our aetherial energy source. Just for this one time, and every time we gather together, our
thoughts were, will be, and are the river of intention.

<BR>

==OUR ART + YOUR ART==
<p>We invite you to bring your magic to plug it into the vortex. Disorient Country Club is an ephemeral dream that exists for one weekend only. Together we ride the spiral of this continually morphing long weekend of art, theme camps, art cars, art boats, and electronic and live music.</p>
<p> </p>
<p><a href="/get-involved">Get involved and register</a> art you'd like to bring!</p>
<div class="image-gallery">





<img src="/art/IMG_9656.JPEG" alt="Art at Country Club" loading="lazy" class="content-image">






<img src="/art/IMG_9720.JPEG" alt="Art at Country Club" loading="lazy" class="content-image">






<img src="/art/IMG_4994.JPEG" alt="Art at Country Club" loading="lazy" class="content-image">






<img src="/art/IMG_4983.JPEG" alt="Art at Country Club" loading="lazy" class="content-image">






<img src="/art/Screenshot%202026-02-28%20135519.png" alt="Art at Country Club" loading="lazy" class="content-image">






<img src="/art/IMG_5021.JPEG" alt="Art at Country Club" loading="lazy" class="content-image">






<img src="/art/IMG_5032.JPEG" alt="Art at Country Club" loading="lazy" class="content-image">






<img src="/art/IMG_9837.JPEG" alt="Art at Country Club" loading="lazy" class="content-image">






<img src="/art/Screenshot%202026-02-28%20135211.png" alt="Art at Country Club" loading="lazy" class="content-image">






<img src="/art/Screenshot%202026-02-28%20135435.png" alt="Art at Country Club" loading="lazy" class="content-image">






<img src="/art/Screenshot%202026-02-28%20135724.png" alt="Art at Country Club" loading="lazy" class="content-image">






<img src="/art/IMG_5056.JPEG" alt="Art at Country Club" loading="lazy" class="content-image">



</div>

<BR>

==TICKETS==

TICKETS: https://events.humanitix.com/disorient-presents-country-club-xiv-presence-and-the-eternal-now<BR>

VOLUNTEER: https://tinyurl.com/4xwyzby7<BR>
SUBMIT ART: https://tinyurl.com/yc8ptjud<BR>
THEMECAMPS PLACEMENT REQUEST: https://tinyurl.com/37u7hmr6<BR>
SUBMIT EVENT OR WORKSHOP TO SURVIVAL GUIDE: https://tinyurl.com/36vjnzer<BR>
ART CAR SUBMISSION: https://tinyurl.com/yc8ptjud<BR>

SURVIVAL GUIDE: https://disorientcountry.club<BR>
DISORIENT WIKI: http://wiki.disorient.info/index.php?title=Country_Club<BR>




==THEME CAMPS==

===Camp Boozehole===
<p>Welcome to Camp Boozehole YA'LL!</p>
<p>This year we present you with the BOOZEHOLE SALOON!</p>
<p>Come on by for a ye olde rootin' tootin' raucously boozy grand old timey!! Serving you hooch (and wild west vibes) all weekend long.</p>
<p>Bring your A game to GET THE BOOT! and we'll be happy to kick you out of our watering hole with a thematic toss through the saloon doors!! (seriously … we want to throw your a** out)</p>





==HOW DO I GET THERE?==
<h2 id="how-do-i-get-there">How Do I Get There?</h2>
<p>Our event takes place near Shandaken, NY, 2 ½ hours north of NYC. We will release the exact location the week of the event.</p>
<p><strong>Transportation Options:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li><strong>DRIVING</strong>: 2 ½ hours north of NYC. Exact location released week of 5/21.</li>
<li><strong>FLYING</strong>: We recommend flying into Newark-EWR and renting a car from the airport. For this option expect 2 ½ hours of drivetime up. Alternatively, fly into Albany-ALB with a 1 ½ hour drive to gate.</li>
<li><strong>UBER/LYFT/ETC</strong>: People have done it, prices vary</li>
<li><strong>RIDESHARE FROM NYC</strong>: Check the <a href="https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1-loCO326kkTCRD_dok8ZOR5EhRYji_IZDiRfa69sHHY/edit?gid=0#gid=0">Rideshare board</a> and the FB event page</li>
<li><strong>BUS</strong>: Take the Trailways bus to Phoenicia and arrange a friend onsite to scoop you up. Phoenicia Trailways Bus stop is 10 mins away from our gate. Tell the driver your stop is Shandaken. <a href="https://webstore.trailways.com/">https://webstore.trailways.com/</a></li>
<li><strong>TRAIN</strong>: AMTRAK to Rhinecliff Stop ID: RHIN. Closest stop is 50 minutes away from our gate. You must arrange a ride from Rhinecliff.</li>
<li><strong>TOWN CAR SERVICE</strong>: Woodstock Town Car <a href="http://woodstocktowncar.com">woodstocktowncar.com</a> (845) 679-6656 Cars, Limos Passenger Vans, service from NYC and Surrounding areas directly to our gate.</li>
<li><strong>SMALL PLANES/HELICOPTER</strong>: Hunter Mountain Airport, ICAO: 97NY, 26 minutes from gate</li>
</ul>


==GENERAL INFO==
* There is no vending at Country Club, and no vending is allowed. Bring everything you need for survival and well-being including shade, food and water. There are no showers on site, feel free to bring your solar shower.<BR>
* You may bring your pets but please be mindful of them, as there are coyotes in the area. Most of the camping site is in the woods.<BR>
* Country Club is minimally RV friendly. Limited number of RV passes available. The site does not offer RV hookups.<BR>
* This is a LEAVE NO TRACE event. This means, leave the place you visit the same or better than you found it. Bring trash bags, and take your trash with you when you leave.<BR>
* All children will require a ticket.<BR>
* Disorient is a volunteer-run art collective.<BR>
* Disorient has very few rules, but two require declaration and elaboration:<BR>
* 1. Respect personal boundaries.<BR>
* 2. Take responsibility for your own experience.<BR>
* The interplay of these two rules forms a social contract that makes our events safe places to explore your own boundaries while encouraging respect for each other. Talk to those around you about anything that makes you uncomfortable.<BR>


==AREAS OF INTEREST==
[https://cs.uwaterloo.ca/~csk/spectre/ A chiral aperiodic monotile]
<BR>
[https://winterbloed.be/catalogue/ Winterbloed]
<BR>
[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QuaXXhuZdVk RA; the Path of the Sun God]
<BR>


==MOODS==
<gallery heights=200 mode="packed-hover">
Image:CCWebsiteSplash_2026_v006.png
</gallery>

==T-SHIRT==
[[Image:CCXiVTshirt.png|240px]]

==ESCUTCHEON==
[[Image:20260121.CCXiVVexillum.png|250px]] <BR>



a [[Country_Club|Disorient COUNTRY CLUB]] event<BR>
